pairs.question: What is Akhil Kumar's boxing style?
pairs.answer: Akhil Kumar practices an 'open guarded' boxing style.

pairs.question: What notable award did Akhil Kumar receive in 2005 from the Indian government?
pairs.answer: In 2005, Akhil Kumar was awarded the Arjuna Award by the Indian government for his achievements in international boxing.

pairs.question: What role did Akhil Kumar and Mary Kom share in 2017?
pairs.answer: In March 2017, Akhil Kumar and Mary Kom were appointed as national observers for boxing by the Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports, Government of India.

pairs.question: List two committees Akhil Kumar has been a member of as part of the Khelo India initiative.
pairs.answer: Akhil Kumar has been a member of the High Powered Committee of Khelo India and the TIDC (Talent Identification and Development Committee) Khelo India (Boxing).

pairs.question: What is the NADA panelist role Akhil Kumar has held and when?
pairs.answer: Akhil Kumar served as a Panellist of the National Anti Doping Agency (NADA) from 2017 to 2019 and from 2021 to the present.

pairs.question: What was Akhil Kumar's role in the selection committees for national awards in 2012 and 2013?
pairs.answer: In 2012, Akhil Kumar was appointed as a Selection Committee Member for the Rajiv Gandhi Khel Ratna and Arjuna Awards. In 2013, he served as a Selection Committee Member for the Bhim Award.

pairs.question: What educational achievement did Akhil Kumar complete in sports coaching?
pairs.answer: Akhil Kumar completed a one-year regular SAI NS NIS Diploma in Sports Coaching (Boxing) and was a topper with an A Grade.

pairs.question: What role did Akhil Kumar play in the selection of the Indian Boxing team for international exposures?
pairs.answer: Akhil Kumar served as a Selection Committee member for the Boxing Federation of India (BFI) for selecting the Indian Boxing team for international exposures.
